name: Dawn Rose
notes: Originally a fishing vessel, converted to cargo use.

name: Gilt Blades
notes: Captain's quarters. Portuguese-style. Manageable with reduced crew of 5. Flagship.

name: Wold Anchor
notes: Similar to Gilt Blades but less refined. Hidden compartment.

name: Sovi
notes: Likely former slaver vessel. Large enough for 23 passengers plus crew. No luxury fittings.

name: Shalindra
notes: Not Dawn Blades property. Allied vessel. Essavane captaining.

name: Revivify
ownership: deeded to Order of Solmir, Dawn Blades occupy
notes: Former Kreel residence. Marcus managing, Miren and Dav assisting. Common room, kitchen, multiple sleeping areas. Workshop space still needed. Brings in 1d4 + 3 refugees per week, plus occasional donations. Refugees often stay for months or longer, so turnover is low. Refugees are people in crisis — fleeing abuse, escaping trafficking, rebuilding after loss. Not a hotel or hostel — more of a sanctuary and support center. Refugees receive care and support to get back on their feet, but not long-term housing or job placement. The goal is to help them get to a place where they can thrive independently, we even offer trades.

name: Overflow Warehouse
notes: Potential Long Arm Trading property.

name: The Winery at Fogstone Hill
furnishings_notes: Furs: bearskin, 2x wolf, seal fur for Sovi already delivered. 15x pillows in one room with a couple furs. Study renovated: floor-to-ceiling shelving, three lockable dual-key cabinets, new desk, two visitor chairs, curtains, rugs, cushioning, reading lamp, few considered objects. Plenty of beds and bedding. Upstairs and outbuildings well furnished.
notes: 3/4 miles southeast of Khemrise. Main house, east outbuilding, stable, courtyard, vineyard rows. Ledwent managing..

name: Marchant Wool Imports
notes: Real wool trading operation with genuine clients and good regional reputation. Just getting rebuilt as a new brand, will increase as it grows. Harwick managing with Rendwick offering contacts.

name: Filas Apothecary
ownership: Dawn Blades own the building, Prestiria Filas operates
notes: Real apothecary, legitimate pharmacist Prestiria Filas. Solid client base, real medicines. Tova handled ownership transition professionally. Supplier relationship with Trevash herb merchant.

name: Loan Dragon
notes: Reformed loan shark operation. Jessyl Denmar manages, Big Tam and Gritch enforce.

name: Long Arm Trading
ownership: Dawn Blades partner, 16% cut to Helena Sable
notes: Aldren Casvath funded 15,000g. Helena Sable 16% partner. Overflow warehouse potential LA Trading property.

name: Millhaven Mine
notes: operated by Coalbeard

name: Farendale House
notes: Two minute walk from Revivify.

name: Crestgate Townhouse
notes: End of row, two levels, side garden. Two minutes from main market square. Comfortable, formerly wealthy owner. Good access, central location.

name: Arrenway Townhouse
notes: Middle of row, modest neighborhood. Area doesn't see people come and go often — difficult to visit unnoticed. Small cellar. Comfortable, formerly wealthy owner. Better suited for discreet use than public-facing operations.

name: Argent Sunrise
notes: Manageable with reduced crew of 5. Very dark hull and signs of repairs. Some sections of wood are double-thick.

name: The Drevorn House
ownership: Dawn Blades, purchased from Drevorn estate
notes: Three levels, each smaller than the last due to decks and balconies built over rooms below. Eight bedrooms, two large reception rooms, central courtyard with dry fountain fed by rooftop cistern system. Staff quarters in east wing, six rooms. Kitchen large and well positioned. Stone construction throughout, structurally sound. Walled and gated on two sides, cliff edge on the other two — natural defensibility. Gardens overgrown but intentionally preserved where possible, wild growth to be shaped rather than cleared. Original Drevorn family home, neighborhood landmark. Fountain mechanism blocked by sediment, two to three hours work to restore. Teleportation circle to be established here. Sivenne Althar appointed house steward. Restoration architect Duvaine contacted via Hallan. Former most prestigious address on the cliff line, restoration will be noticed by neighbors.

name: Ravenquay Docks Warehouse
notes: Morrow and Selt staying as tenants.

name: Khemrise Ostwick Townhouse
notes: Tailor's workshop staying as tenant. Formerly Ostwick family property.
